H

handle(PeekingIterator<String>, FlagRegistry, FlagListener) - Method in interface cli.FlagHandler
Processes a flag and its potential arguments.
handle(PeekingIterator<String>, FlagRegistry, FlagListener) - Method in class cli.LongFlagHandler
Processes a long-form flag and its potential arguments by consuming tokens from the iterator provided.
handle(PeekingIterator<String>, FlagRegistry, FlagListener) - Method in class cli.ShortFlagHandler
Processes a short-form flag and its potential arguments by consuming tokens from the iterator provided.
handled - Variable in class cli.FlagRule
 
hasSeparator() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Queries whether a value separator (=) was detected for this flag.
hasValueAssigned() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Checks if this flag has any values assigned to it.
